creator: rick@ramondo.com
text:
@John, thanks for posting this. I had the exact same issue appear.  Removal of the protobuf library solved the linking error.  If any additional info is needed to help debug, I can provide. 

protobuf was required by both bind918 + bind-tools and netdata-1.43.2_2

Re-install of the protobuf library made mysqld non-start.
-R
